case_title: WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGMENT COMPANY VS. MARC LOUIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOUIS, MARC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 FRANKLIN STREET, UNIT NUMBER 104, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIS, MARC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGMENT COMPANY SERVED NOV-18-2013, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE: COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGMENT COMPANY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL $56.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGMENT COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LOUIS, MARC
